zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Herrick於1675年6月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利時，他的父親Ephraim Herrick Sr38歲，母親Mary Crosse34歲。他於大約1698年10月23日與Mehitable Woodward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1702年住在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦普雷斯頓。他去世於1730年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦普雷斯頓享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Herrick于1675年6月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利时，他的父亲Ephraim Herrick Sr38岁，母亲Mary Crosse34岁。他于大约1698年10月23日与Mehitable Woodward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1702年住在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦普雷斯頓。他去世于1730年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦普雷斯頓享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old Norse personal name Eiríkr, Old Danish, Old Swedish Erik, itself from Proto-Scandinavian ain- ‘one, select’ + rík- ‘rule(r)’ + prosthetic H-.

Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEirc ‘descendant of Erc’, a personal name meaning ‘speckled, dark red’ or ‘salmon’, and borne by a Christian saint. In Munster and Ulster this name has been changed to Harkin .

History: The English poet Robert Herrick (1591–1674) was the son of a wealthy London goldsmith, whose family had a long history in the town of Leicester. DNA analysis suggests that the modern surname is monogenetic, i.e. from a single eponymous bearer. The earliest known bearer of the name in Leicester was John Eirich, recorded as a burgess there in 1211. Leicester was one of the headquarters of the Viking army that conquered and settled the eastern midlands in the late 9th century, leading to the English adoption of many Old Norse personal names, such as Eirikr, as personal names. The initial aspirate is first recorded in the name of Nicholas Heyryke, recorded as a Leicester burgess in 1524.

variants.name: Harkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac, Jarlath, Paddy.

Irish (Donegal) and Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarcáin ‘descendant of Earcán’, a byname or personal name formed from a diminutive of earc ‘red, bloody’; also meaning ‘piglet’.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hardekin, Harkin, a borrowing into late Old English of Middle Dutch Hardekin. It is a pet form of ancient Germanic Hardo (see Hard 4) + the Middle Dutch hypocoristic suffix -kin. The name of a (presumably continental) moneyer at Stamford is stamped HÆRƉCYN, HARƉCIN, and HARCIN on coins of the reign of Edward the Confessor.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Herrick was born on 4 June 1675, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Ephraim Herrick Sr, was 38 and his mother, Mary Crosse, was 34. He married Mehitable Woodward about 23 October 1698, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Preston, New London, Connecticut, United States in 1702. He died in 1730, in Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Herrick est né le 4 juin 1675, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Ephraim Herrick Sr, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Crosse, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Mehitable Woodward environ 23 octobre 1698, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Preston, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis en 1702. Il est décédé en 1730, à Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Herrick am 4. Juni 1675 in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ephraim Herrick Sr 38 und seine Mutter Mary Crosse 34. Er hat um 23. Oktober 1698 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mehitable Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1702 hat er in Preston, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb 1730 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Herrick è nato il il 4 giugno 1675 nel Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Ephraim Herrick Sr, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mary Crosse, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Mehitable Woodward circa 23 ottobre 1698, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Preston, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1702. Morì nel 1730, nel Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Herrickが1675年6月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスベバーリーで生まれた時，父Ephraim Herrick Srは38歳，母Mary Crosseは34歳であった。約1698年10月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでMehitable Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1702年にはアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンプレストンに住んでいた。彼は1730年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンプレストンで55歳で死去した。

ko.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리
ko.Preston, Conneticut: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴
ko.Preston, New London, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴
ko.New London, New London, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Herrick(이)가 1675년 6월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ephraim Herrick Sr(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Crosse(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1698년 10월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Mehitable Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1702년도에 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴에서 살았다. 그는 1730년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Herrick nasceu em 4 de junho de 1675, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Ephraim Herrick Sr, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Crosse, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mehitable Woodward aproximadamente 23 de outubro de 1698, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Preston, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América em 1702. Ele faleceu em 1730, em Preston, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 55 anos.

ru.New London, New London, Connecticut Colo: ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Herrick родился 4 июня 1675 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Ephraim Herrick Sr было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Crosse, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mehitable Woodward около 23 октября 1698 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности престон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в 1702 году. Он умер в 1730 г. в местности престон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Herrick nació el 4 de junio de 1675, en Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Ephraim Herrick Sr, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Crosse, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Mehitable Woodward aproximadamente 23 de octubre de 1698, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Preston, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos en 1702. Murió en 1730, en Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 55 años.
